jokes.setup: A programmer had a problem. He decided to use Java.
Why didn't the elephant get the job he wanted?
Hvad siger Indiana Jones når han går ind til en bilforhandler?
If you have 15 cows and 5 goats what would you have?

jokes.punchline: At selv højmose ser tynd ud ved siden af hende

jokes.setup: Hvad gør spiderman efter han har drukket kaffe?
Hvad er forskellen på en 12 årig og en prostitueret?
jokes.punchline: Hvis ikke du ved det er du satme klam...

jokes.punchline: At selv hans mor kigger måbende på ham

jokes.setup: Hvad kalder man en klam narkoman fra sjælland?

How do you tell an introverted computer scientist from an extroverted computer scientist?
jokes.punchline: An extroverted computer scientist looks at your shoes when he talks to you.

jokes.setup: What do computers and air conditioners have in common?
jokes.punchline: They both become useless when you open windows.

jokes.setup: Why do Java programmers have to wear glasses?
What is a programmer's favourite hangout place?

jokes.punchline: Did you ever hear the tragedy of Darth Plagueis The Wise? I thought not. It's not a story the Jedi would tell you. It's a Sith legend. Darth Plagueis was a Dark Lord of the Sith, so powerful and so wise he could use the Force to influence the midichlorians to create life… He had such a knowledge of the dark side that he could even keep the ones he cared about from dying. The dark side of the Force is a pathway to many abilities some consider to be unnatural. He became so powerful… the only thing he was afraid of was losing his power, which eventually, of course, he did. Unfortunately, he taught his apprentice everything he knew, then his apprentice killed him in his sleep. Ironic. He could save others from death, but not himself.

The dark side of the Force is a pathway to many abilities some consider to be unnatural. He became so powerful… the only thing he was afraid of was losing his power, which eventually, of course, he did. Unfortunately, he taught his apprentice everything he knew, then his apprentice killed him in his sleep. Ironic. He could save others from death, but not himself.

Det ved jeg ikke, men den er RÅ-dyr.

jokes.setup: Hvordan får man en fisk til at grine??
Hvad siger en Bi, når den ser sig selv i spejlet?
“Hallo tjener, der er en flue i min suppe!”
jokes.punchline: "Jamen, det er da begrænset hvor meget en flue drikker."

jokes.setup: Hvad er forskellen på et batteri og SIF?
Hvorfor kan fiskerne ikke lide techno?
jokes.punchline: Fordi de er mere til havs.

jokes.setup: Hvorfor er der så mange frisører på Bornholm?
I told my wife she was drawing her eyebrows too high.
Someone stole my Microsoft Office and they're going to pay.
What is a programmer's favorite hangout place?
0 is false and 1 is true, right?
3 SQL programmers walked into a NoSQL bar. A little while later, they left it. Why?
jokes.punchline: Because they couldn't find a table

jokes.setup: I once had a problem, which I tried to solve using threads
What's the best thing about UDP jokes?
jokes.punchline: I don't care if you get them

jokes.setup: A programmer puts two glasses on his bedside table before going to sleep
jokes.punchline: A full one, in case he gets thirsty, and an empty one, in case he doesn’t.

jokes.setup: A computer programmer rushes his wife to the hospital where she gives birth to their child. The doctor first hands the baby to the programmer. 'Well?' his wife says impatiently. 'Is it a boy, or is it a girl?
Programmer's son asks his father: Dad, why does the sun rise on the east and set on the west?
jokes.punchline: Father: It works, don't touch it!

jokes.setup: How do you generate a random string?
jokes.punchline: You put a web designer in front of VIM and tell him to save and exit
